zh.lifeSummary: 當Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan於1280年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel50歲，母親Agnes de Cantilupe48歲。他與Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan于1280年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel50岁，母亲Agnes de Cantilupe48岁。他与Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Hopkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, now found mainly in Wales. It is derived from a medieval given name, a pet form (with the diminutive suffix -kin) of Hob, a short form of Robert that probably had its origin through English mishearing of the Norman pronunciation of R-.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan was born in 1280, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel, was 50 and his mother, Agnes de Cantilupe, was 48. He married Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 12 daughters. He died in 1370, in England, at the age of 90, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan est né en 1280, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Cantilupe, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé en 1370, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan 1280 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel 50 und seine Mutter Agnes de Cantilupe 48. Er hat Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 90 Jahren in England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan è nato il nel 1280 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Cantilupe, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 12 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hopkin ap Hywel Fychanが1280年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Hywel Fychan Ap Hywelは50歳，母Agnes de Cantilupeは48歳であった。Gwenllian verch Rhys Foelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan(이)가 1280년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Cantilupe(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan nasceu em 1280, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Cantilupe, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan родился в 1280 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Cantilupe, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan nació en 1280, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Agnes de Cantilupe, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
